entries.title: anaconda.toml
entries.full_content:
# Installable ISO (Anaconda)
[customizations.installer.kickstart]
contents = """
text --non-interactive
lang en_US.UTF-8
keyboard us
timezone --utc UTC
reqpart --add-boot
part / --grow --fstype=ext4
"""

[customizations.installer.modules]
enable  = ["org.fedoraproject.Anaconda.Modules.Storage"]
disable = ["org.fedoraproject.Anaconda.Modules.Users"]

[customizations.iso]
volume_id      = "MIOS"
application_id = "MiOS"
publisher      = "Kabuki94"

entries.title: iso.toml
entries.full_content:
# bib-configs/iso.toml - MiOS v2.1.0
# Target: Anaconda unattended installer ISO for bare-metal install.
#
# NOTE: BIB #528 - [customizations.user] is ignored when kickstart is present.
#       User is defined IN the kickstart below.
# NOTE: Source container image MUST include dracut-live + squashfs-tools, or
#       this build leg will fail. Containerfile installs these in v2.1.0.

[customizations.kernel]
append = "rd.driver.blacklist=nouveau modprobe.blacklist=nouveau iommu=pt"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/"
minsize    = "150 GiB"

[customizations.installer.modules]
disable = ["org.fedoraproject.Anaconda.Modules.Users"]

[customizations.installer.kickstart]
contents = """
text --non-interactive
lang en_US.UTF-8
keyboard us
timezone --utc UTC

network --bootproto=dhcp --device=link --activate --onboot=on

zerombr
clearpart --all --initlabel --disklabel=gpt
reqpart --add-boot
part / --grow --fstype ext4

# Replace the crypted password and ssh key below before publishing ISO.
user --name=mios --groups=wheel,render,video --iscrypted --password=$6$REPLACEME_WITH_SHA512_HASH$REPLACEME
sshkey --username=mios "ssh-ed25519 AAAA_REPLACE_WITH_REAL_PUBKEY mios@operator"

reboot --eject
"""

entries.title: qcow2.toml
entries.full_content:
# bib-configs/qcow2.toml - MiOS v2.1.0
# Target: local libvirt/QEMU smoke-test of ghcr.io/kabuki94/mios:latest
# Generated by: quay.io/centos-bootc/bootc-image-builder --type qcow2

[[customizations.user]]
name     = "mios"
# Replace with: openssl passwd -6 'your-password'
password = "$6$REPLACEME_WITH_SHA512_HASH$REPLACEME"
# Replace with your real ssh-ed25519 public key
key      = "ssh-ed25519 AAAA_REPLACE_WITH_REAL_PUBKEY mios@operator"
groups   = ["wheel", "render", "video"]

[customizations.kernel]
append = "rd.driver.blacklist=nouveau modprobe.blacklist=nouveau iommu=pt"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/"
minsize    = "150 GiB"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/var/home"
minsize    = "20 GiB"

entries.title: vhdx.toml
entries.full_content:
# bib-configs/vhdx.toml - MiOS v2.1.0
# Target: Hyper-V on Windows host (MiOS-2 bare metal + Win11 + RTX 4090)
# BIB --type vhd emits VPC/.vhd; CI post-converts to .vhdx via qemu-img convert.

[[customizations.user]]
name     = "mios"
# Replace with: openssl passwd -6 'your-password'
password = "$6$REPLACEME_WITH_SHA512_HASH$REPLACEME"
# Replace with your real ssh-ed25519 public key
key      = "ssh-ed25519 AAAA_REPLACE_WITH_REAL_PUBKEY mios@operator"
groups   = ["wheel", "render", "video"]

[customizations.kernel]
append = "rd.driver.blacklist=nouveau modprobe.blacklist=nouveau iommu=pt"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/"
minsize    = "150 GiB"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/var/home"
minsize    = "20 GiB"

entries.title: qemu.toml
entries.full_content:
# QEMU/libvirt qcow2 target (btrfs - verity-capable)
[customizations.kernel]
append = "mios.role=desktop"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/"
minsize = "40 GiB"

entries.title: build-all.sh
entries.full_content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# build-all.sh - emit every deployment artifact from one image
set -euo pipefail

IMG="${IMG:-ghcr.io/kabuki94/mios:latest}"
OUT="${OUT:-$PWD/out}"
mkdir -p "$OUT"

BIB="quay.io/centos-bootc/bootc-image-builder:latest"

run_bib() {
    local cfg="$1" type="$2" rootfs="${3:-ext4}"
    podman run --rm --privileged --pull=newer \
        -v "$PWD/bib-configs/${cfg}:/config.toml:ro" \
        -v "$OUT:/output" \
        -v /var/lib/containers/storage:/var/lib/containers/storage \
        "$BIB" \
        --type "$type" --rootfs "$rootfs" \
        --config /config.toml "$IMG"
}

run_bib hyperv.toml   vhd       ext4
run_bib qemu.toml     qcow2     btrfs
run_bib anaconda.toml anaconda-iso
run_bib cloud-ami.toml ami      ext4

# WSL2 tarball (not a BIB type - export from running container)
echo "==> exporting WSL2 tarball"
cid=$(podman create "$IMG" /bin/true)
podman export "$cid" | zstd -T0 -19 -o "$OUT/mios-wsl2.tar.zst"
podman rm "$cid"

echo "==> artifacts in $OUT:"
ls -lh "$OUT"

entries.title: _shared.toml
entries.full_content:
# Shared fragment - include in target-specific configs.
[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/"
minsize = "40 GiB"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/var"
minsize = "80 GiB"

[[customizations.user]]
name = "kabu"
groups = ["wheel", "libvirt", "kvm", "video", "render"]
# Replace with ssh-ed25519 pubkey at build time via `envsubst` or BIB --arg

entries.title: hyperv.toml
entries.full_content:
# Hyper-V VHDX target
[customizations.kernel]
append = "mios.role=desktop console=tty1"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/"
minsize = "40 GiB"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/var"
minsize = "80 GiB"

entries.title: cloud-ami.toml
entries.full_content:
# AWS AMI target
[customizations.kernel]
append = "mios.role=headless"

[[customizations.filesystem]]
mountpoint = "/"
minsize = "20 GiB"
